labor_share.basis: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 561710 ($8,715,666,468) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 561710 ($19,563,962,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.basis: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[56]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $139,825 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 561710); class <5: 8,882 firms, avg revenue/firm $236,662 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $37,038 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 2,491 firms, avg revenue/firm $736,951 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $115,333 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 1,373 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,587,316 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $248,415 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 766 firms, avg revenue/firm $4,665,939 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $730,219 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 70 firms, avg revenue/firm $21,941,586 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $3,433,858 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 21 firms, avg revenue/firm $396,989,381 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $62,128,838 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 70
